operation: Wire live data to production site — raise emissive baseline, push pipeline, PartyKit fallback in KingdomLiveContext
architectural_plaque: Push not pull. Brandon's machine POSTs to PartyKit every 30s. PartyKit stores lastPayload and serves it to new connections. KingdomLiveContext tries localhost:2701 first (local dev), falls back to /api/partykit-snapshot (production). One push script, one endpoint, one fallback — no tunnels, no external services.
prd_reference: KINGDOM_MAP/PHASE_53_PLAN.md (partial overlap — this build is pre-5.3 data foundation)
priorities: Story 3: Add /api/partykit-snapshot endpoint (reads PartyKit stored payload)
Story 4: KingdomLiveContext fallback — check /api/partykit-snapshot when API fails
Story 5: TypeScript gate + commit + push + smoke test
